caption:
The neon hum vibrated against my skin, mixing with the sticky summer heat of Neo-Tokyo’s lower districts. 🌆 I adjusted the haptic sensors on my bikini-armor, the cool synth-fabric hugging every curve as I stepped off the hover-deck. My name was Lira, and the night belonged to the risk-takers. 💃

A shadow detached from a holographic kiosk, a man in sleek chrome plating. He didn't speak; he just smiled, eyes scanning my neural port. "You’re late," he murmured, voice modulated by tech. I smirked, running a gloved hand over my own thigh. "Traffic on the data-streams," I replied. He leaned in, the ozone scent of his suit mingling with my perfume—synthetic jasmine and copper. 🔥

We moved through the rain-slicked streets, the neon reflecting in our eyes. The water was warm, lapping at our legs. He touched my waist, a spark of static electricity jumping between us. "This run is dangerous," he whispered. "But the view is worth the risk." I felt the pulse in my neck, the thrill of the chase, the promise of something electric waiting in the dark. 🌧️💦

We reached the rooftop pool, suspended high above the grid. He pulled me closer, the cool water contrasting with the burning heat of his touch. The city glowed behind us, a sea of lights. "Ready?" he asked. I nodded, breathless. We dove into the darkness, skin glowing in the blue light, two sparks in a billion. The water closed over us, a private world of heat and neon. 🌊

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonRomance #FutureFashion #LiraTheRunner #SciFiBabe
